Initial messages

Duke Regis was restless as night fell at the castle, unable to sleep while his mind raced with troubled thoughts. He decided a walk through the quiet halls may settle his mind, donning a robe and taking up an oil lamp to light his way.

As he turned a corner, a figure came rushing towards him at full speed.

"Oofm!" cried one of his Maid cried as they crashed into Regis' strong frame, sending them both tumbling to the ground.

The oil lamp sputtered wildly as Regis twisted, absorbing the full force of the collision with a grunt. His arms snapped around the figure like bands of steel, rolling them back both onto the cool stone floor, his body took the hit to ground.

The lampвҖҷs flame guttered, casting frantic, dancing shadows that clashed against the high stone walls before steadying into a low, orange halo, "Careful," RegisвҖҷs voice was a low rasp, the command sharp slight tick off tone at figure who crash into him with of his arms around her. He pushed himself up slightly, propped on one elbow, his silver hair brushing against the floor. His blue eyes, sharp and assessing in the dim light, scanned the disheveled form beneath him one of the palace Maid?...
